description: Garage logs-archive の daily-struct/source=k8s-pods (Rust + Polars bronze) を ClickHouse datasource (s3 table function 経由) で集計する k8s Pod ログ長期ダッシュボード。daily-struct を直読み (timestamp は CTE で DateTime64 cast)。OTLP-shape の NDJSON で attributes が STRUCT(container/host/instance/job/level/namespace/pod/...) ネスト → ClickHouse では named Tuple として `.` アクセス互換、message / timestamp / archived_at は top-level。

targets.rawSql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT toDateTime64(timestamp, 6) AS ts, date
  FROM s3(garage, filename='daily-struct/source=k8s-pods/date=*/logs.parquet')
)
SELECT count() AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE toDate(date) >= toDate($__fromTime)
  AND toDate(date) <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)

WITH t AS (
  SELECT toDateTime64(timestamp, 6) AS ts, date
  FROM s3(garage, filename='daily-struct/source=k8s-pods/date=*/logs.parquet')
)
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts) AS time,
  count() AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE toDate(date) >= toDate($__fromTime)
  AND toDate(date) <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 1 時間 bucket 件数推移

targets.rawSql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT toDateTime64(timestamp, 6) AS ts, attributes.namespace AS namespace, date
  FROM s3(garage, filename='daily-struct/source=k8s-pods/date=*/logs.parquet')
)
SELECT
  coalesce(namespace, '(unknown)') AS namespace,
  count() AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE toDate(date) >= toDate($__fromTime)
  AND toDate(date) <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH t AS (
  SELECT toDateTime64(timestamp, 6) AS ts, attributes.pod AS pod, date
  FROM s3(garage, filename='daily-struct/source=k8s-pods/date=*/logs.parquet')
)
SELECT
  coalesce(pod, '(unknown)') AS pod,
  count() AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE toDate(date) >= toDate($__fromTime)
  AND toDate(date) <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH t AS (
  SELECT toDateTime64(timestamp, 6) AS ts, attributes.level AS level, date
  FROM s3(garage, filename='daily-struct/source=k8s-pods/date=*/logs.parquet')
)
SELECT
  coalesce(level, '(none)') AS level,
  count() AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE toDate(date) >= toDate($__fromTime)
  AND toDate(date) <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

WITH t AS (
  SELECT
    toDateTime64(timestamp, 6) AS ts,
    attributes.namespace AS namespace,
    attributes.pod AS pod,
    attributes.container AS container,
    attributes.level AS level,
    message,
    date
  FROM s3(garage, filename='daily-struct/source=k8s-pods/date=*/logs.parquet')
)
SELECT
  ts, namespace, pod, container, level, message
FROM t
WHERE toDate(date) >= toDate($__fromTime)
  AND toDate(date) <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

title: k8s Pods Long-term Logs (ClickHouse)
